# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from "next";

export default async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  if (!(req.method === 'POST')) {
    return res.status(405).json({ error: `Method ${req.method} not allowed` });
  }
  
  const userData = JSON.parse(req.body);
  let headers = {};
  
  if (userData && 'headers' in userData) {
    // Assuming the headers are sent as an object
    headers = userData.headers;
  }

  // Create a Readable Stream from a string, you might want to replace this with your actual data source
  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      controller.enqueue(`${userData}`);
      controller.close();
    }
  });
  
  // Set the headers and status code
  res.set(headers).status(200);

  // Pipe the stream to the response object
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    stream.pipeTo(res).catch(() => resolve('Stream was closed'));
  });
};
